name: Generate Anima Image
description: Generate an anime-style image using the Anima diffusion model. Optimized for Danbooru tag + natural language prompts. Use the quality prefix format: masterpiece, best quality, score_7, safe/nsfw, <tags>

defaults.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, blurry, jpeg artifacts, sepia
